



Respuesta de IA
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Isaac — Artista, Viajero & Músico</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --warm: #e8dcc8;
    --gold: #c9a84c;
    --rust: #b5541f;
    --teal: #2a7c8a;
    --dark: #1a1814;
    --text: #2c2416;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background-color: var(--cream);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    background: var(--dark);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 60%, #2a4a3a 0%, transparent 55%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 25%, #3a2010 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 90%, #1a2a3a 0%, transparent 60%),
                #1a1814;
    opacity: 0.9;
  }

  .hero-grid {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px),
                      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(4rem, 12vw, 10rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 0.9;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.5s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name span {
    color: var(--gold);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .hero-tagline {
    font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.55);
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.7s forwards;
  }

  .hero-icons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.9s forwards;
  }

  .hero-icon {
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    transition: transform 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    cursor: default;
  }
  .hero-icon:hover { transform: scale(1.3) rotate(-5deg); }

  .scroll-hint {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 2.5rem;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1.2s forwards;
  }

  .scroll-hint span {
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.4);
  }

  .scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 50px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent);
    animation: scrollDown 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(26,24,20,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.65);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section {
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .divider {
    width: 60px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  .about-layout {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4rem;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .about-text p {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    line-height: 1.85;
    color: #4a3e2e;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }

  .about-text p strong {
    color: var(--rust);
  }

  .about-card {
    background: var(--dark);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .about-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 4px; height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), var(--rust));
  }

  .stat-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  }

  .stat-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.45);
  }

  .stat-value {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  /* ── PASSIONS GRID ── */
  .passions-bg {
    background: var(--dark);
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .passions-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .passions-inner .section-title {
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  .passions-inner .section-label {
    color: var(--gold);
  }

  .passions-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1.5px;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  }

  .passion-card {
    background: #1e1b16;
    padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: background 0.4s;
    cursor: default;
  }

  .passion-card:hover {
    background: #242018;
  }

  .passion-card:hover .passion-icon {
    transform: scale(1.15) rotate(-3deg);
  }

  .passion-icon {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }

  .passion-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--cream);
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }

  .passion-desc {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.45);
  }

  .passion-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    font-size: 0.62rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    color: var(--gold);
    border-radius: 2px;
  }

  /* ── PAINTINGS ── */
  .paintings-section {
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
  }

  .paintings-intro {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
    gap: 3rem;
    align-items: end;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  .paintings-intro p {
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #4a3e2e;
  }

  .paintings-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
    background: #2c2416;
  }

  .painting-item {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  }

  .painting-item img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease, filter 0.4s;
    filter: brightness(0.92) saturate(1.1);
  }

  .painting-item:hover img {
    transform: scale(1.06);
    filter: brightness(1) saturate(1.2);
  }

  .painting-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(26,24,20,0.75) 0%, transparent 50%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.4s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    padding: 1.5rem;
  }

  .painting-item:hover .painting-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .painting-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }

  /* ── TRAVEL ── */
  .travel-bg {
    background: #f0e9d8;
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
  }

  .travel-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .travel-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 3rem;
  }

  .travel-card {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 2px;
    aspect-ratio: 2/3;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .travel-card img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s;
    filter: saturate(0.85);
  }

  .travel-card:hover img {
    transform: scale(1.07);
    filter: saturate(1);
  }

  .travel-info {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(26,24,20,0.85) 0%, rgba(26,24,20,0.1) 60%, transparent 100%);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    transition: background 0.4s;
  }

  .travel-city {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .travel-country {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
  }

  .travel-dream {
    border: 2px dashed rgba(26,24,20,0.3);
    background: transparent;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .travel-dream .dream-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }
  .travel-dream .dream-text {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--text);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .travel-dream .dream-sub {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(42,36,22,0.5);
  }

  /* ── MUSIC ── */
  .music-section {
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
    background: var(--dark);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .music-section::before {
    content: '♪';
    position: absolute;
    font-size: 30rem;
    color: rgba(201,168,76,0.03);
    top: -5rem; right: -5rem;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .music-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .music-inner .section-title {
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  .instruments-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 3rem;
  }

  .instrument {
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.18);
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }

  .instrument:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }

  .instrument.dream {
    border-style: dashed;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .instrument.dream:hover { opacity: 1; }

  .instrument-emoji { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; display: block; }

  .instrument-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }

  .instrument-status {
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .instrument.dream .instrument-status { color: var(--gold); }
  .instrument:not(.dream) .instrument-status { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.4); }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: #110f0c;
    padding: 4rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  }

  .footer-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .footer-city {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.3);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .footer-quote {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5);
    max-width: 500px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes scrollDown {
    0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 1; }
    50% { transform: scaleY(0.5); opacity: 0.4; }
  }

  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
    transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
  }

  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .about-layout, .paintings-intro { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .paintings-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .passions-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .instruments-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .travel-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    nav .nav-links { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="inicio">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Barranquilla, Colombia — 15 años</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">I<span>saac</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Artista · Bailarín · Músico · Viajero</p>
    <div class="hero-icons">
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Pintura">🎨</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Ballet">🩰</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Música">🎹</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Viajes">✈️</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Baile">💃</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Patinaje">⛸️</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>Explorar</span>
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <span class="nav-logo">Isaac</span>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#sobre-mi">Sobre mí</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pasiones">Pasiones</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pinturas">Arte</a></li>
    <li><a href="#viajes">Viajes</a></li>
    <li><a href="#musica">Música</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- SOBRE MÍ -->
<section id="sobre-mi">
  <div class="about-layout reveal">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p class="section-label">Sobre mí</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Una vida llena<br>de arte y movimiento</h2>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <p>
        Soy Isaac, tengo <strong>15 años</strong> y crecí en Barranquilla, la ciudad del carnaval. Desde pequeño el arte y la expresión han sido parte de mi vida: estudié <strong>ballet clásico</strong> desde los 5 años, y aunque lo dejé para enfocarme en mis estudios, esa disciplina dejó huella en todo lo que hago.
      </p>
      <p>
        Me apasiona la <strong>pintura y el dibujo técnico</strong> — los cuadros que ves aquí los pinté yo mismo. Hay algo en convertir una tela en blanco en un mundo de color que me fascina profundamente.
      </p>
      <p>
        También me encanta bailar: la <strong>salsa, el merengue, el mapalé y la champeta</strong> son parte de mi identidad caribeña. Y recientemente, viendo los Juegos Olímpicos de Milán-Cortina, me enamoré del <strong>patinaje sobre hielo</strong> — un sueño nuevo por conquistar.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="about-card">
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Ciudad</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Barranquilla 🇨🇴</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Edad</span>
        <span class="stat-value">15 años</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Ballet</span>
        <span class="stat-value">5 años de formación</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Pinturas</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Óleo & Acrílico</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Países visitados</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Francia · Italia</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Instrumentos</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Piano · Bajo eléctrico</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Próximo sueño</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Patinaje sobre hielo ⛸️</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PASIONES -->
<div class="passions-bg" id="pasiones">
  <div class="passions-inner">
    <p class="section-label">Lo que me define</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Mis Pasiones</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="passions-grid reveal">
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">🎨</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Arte & Pintura</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Óleo y acrílico sobre lienzo. Paisajes marinos, figuras y naturaleza. El arte es mi forma de procesar el mundo.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Técnico & Libre</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">🩰</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Danza</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Ballet clásico por 5 años, hoy salsa, merengue, mapalé y champeta. El ritmo de Barranquilla corre por mis venas.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Desde los 5 años</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">✈️</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Viajes</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">París, Milán, Venecia, Florencia y Pisa ya están en mi mapa. Londres es el próximo destino en mi lista.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Europa conquistada</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">🎹</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Música</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Piano y bajo eléctrico como instrumentos actuales. El violín y la flauta traversa son mis próximas metas musicales.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Clásico & Moderno</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">⛸️</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Patinaje sobre Hielo</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Un sueño encendido por los Juegos Olímpicos de Milán-Cortina 2026. La elegancia del hielo me cautivó.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Sueño por cumplir</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">📐</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Dibujo Técnico</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">La precisión del dibujo técnico complementa la libertad de la pintura. Amo la fusión entre arte y exactitud.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Arte & Precisión</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PINTURAS -->
<div class="paintings-section" id="pinturas">
  <div style="max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">
    <div class="paintings-intro reveal">
      <div>
        <p class="section-label">Galería personal</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">Mis Pinturas</h2>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <p>Cada cuadro es un mundo que construí pincelada a pincelada. Trabajo principalmente con acrílico, explorando desde la serenidad de los paisajes marinos hasta la energía del movimiento y la vida marina.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:right;">
        <span style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:4rem; color:rgba(42,36,22,0.12); line-height:1;">🖌️</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="paintings-grid reveal">
      <div class="painting-item">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,

isaac.html
Es mostra isaac.html.
Charlar

Nueva Conversación

🤓 Explica algo complejo

Explica la Inteligencia Artificial de tal manera que pueda explicársela a mi hijo de seis años.


🧠 Obtén sugerencias y crea nuevas ideas

Por favor, dame las mejores 10 ideas para viajar alrededor del mundo".


💭 Traducir, resumir, corregir gramática y más...

Traduce "Te amo", al francés.



AITOPIA
Hola, ¿cómo puedo ayudarte hoy?




AITOPIA

8
Actualizar





<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Isaac — Artista, Viajero & Músico</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --warm: #e8dcc8;
    --gold: #c9a84c;
    --rust: #b5541f;
    --teal: #2a7c8a;
    --dark: #1a1814;
    --text: #2c2416;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background-color: var(--cream);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    background: var(--dark);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 60%, #2a4a3a 0%, transparent 55%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 25%, #3a2010 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 90%, #1a2a3a 0%, transparent 60%),
                #1a1814;
    opacity: 0.9;
  }

  .hero-grid {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px),
                      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(4rem, 12vw, 10rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 0.9;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.5s forwards;
  }

  .hero-name span {
    color: var(--gold);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .hero-tagline {
    font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.55);
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.7s forwards;
  }

  .hero-icons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.9s forwards;
  }

  .hero-icon {
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    transition: transform 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    cursor: default;
  }
  .hero-icon:hover { transform: scale(1.3) rotate(-5deg); }

  .scroll-hint {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 2.5rem;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1.2s forwards;
  }

  .scroll-hint span {
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.4);
  }

  .scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 50px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent);
    animation: scrollDown 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(26,24,20,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.65);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section {
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .divider {
    width: 60px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  .about-layout {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4rem;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .about-text p {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    line-height: 1.85;
    color: #4a3e2e;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }

  .about-text p strong {
    color: var(--rust);
  }

  .about-card {
    background: var(--dark);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .about-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 4px; height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), var(--rust));
  }

  .stat-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  }

  .stat-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.45);
  }

  .stat-value {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  /* ── PASSIONS GRID ── */
  .passions-bg {
    background: var(--dark);
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .passions-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .passions-inner .section-title {
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  .passions-inner .section-label {
    color: var(--gold);
  }

  .passions-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1.5px;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  }

  .passion-card {
    background: #1e1b16;
    padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: background 0.4s;
    cursor: default;
  }

  .passion-card:hover {
    background: #242018;
  }

  .passion-card:hover .passion-icon {
    transform: scale(1.15) rotate(-3deg);
  }

  .passion-icon {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }

  .passion-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--cream);
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }

  .passion-desc {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.45);
  }

  .passion-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    font-size: 0.62rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    color: var(--gold);
    border-radius: 2px;
  }

  /* ── PAINTINGS ── */
  .paintings-section {
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
  }

  .paintings-intro {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
    gap: 3rem;
    align-items: end;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  .paintings-intro p {
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #4a3e2e;
  }

  .paintings-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 0;
    background: #2c2416;
  }

  .painting-item {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  }

  .painting-item img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease, filter 0.4s;
    filter: brightness(0.92) saturate(1.1);
  }

  .painting-item:hover img {
    transform: scale(1.06);
    filter: brightness(1) saturate(1.2);
  }

  .painting-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(26,24,20,0.75) 0%, transparent 50%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.4s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    padding: 1.5rem;
  }

  .painting-item:hover .painting-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .painting-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }

  /* ── TRAVEL ── */
  .travel-bg {
    background: #f0e9d8;
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
  }

  .travel-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .travel-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 3rem;
  }

  .travel-card {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 2px;
    aspect-ratio: 2/3;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .travel-card img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s;
    filter: saturate(0.85);
  }

  .travel-card:hover img {
    transform: scale(1.07);
    filter: saturate(1);
  }

  .travel-info {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(26,24,20,0.85) 0%, rgba(26,24,20,0.1) 60%, transparent 100%);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    transition: background 0.4s;
  }

  .travel-city {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .travel-country {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
  }

  .travel-dream {
    border: 2px dashed rgba(26,24,20,0.3);
    background: transparent;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .travel-dream .dream-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }
  .travel-dream .dream-text {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--text);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .travel-dream .dream-sub {
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(42,36,22,0.5);
  }

  /* ── MUSIC ── */
  .music-section {
    padding: 6rem 2rem;
    background: var(--dark);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .music-section::before {
    content: '♪';
    position: absolute;
    font-size: 30rem;
    color: rgba(201,168,76,0.03);
    top: -5rem; right: -5rem;
    font-family: serif;
    line-height: 1;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .music-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .music-inner .section-title {
    color: var(--cream);
  }

  .instruments-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 3rem;
  }

  .instrument {
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.18);
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }

  .instrument:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }

  .instrument.dream {
    border-style: dashed;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .instrument.dream:hover { opacity: 1; }

  .instrument-emoji { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; display: block; }

  .instrument-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }

  .instrument-status {
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .instrument.dream .instrument-status { color: var(--gold); }
  .instrument:not(.dream) .instrument-status { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.4); }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: #110f0c;
    padding: 4rem 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  }

  .footer-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .footer-city {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.3);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .footer-quote {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5);
    max-width: 500px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes scrollDown {
    0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 1; }
    50% { transform: scaleY(0.5); opacity: 0.4; }
  }

  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
    transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
  }

  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .about-layout, .paintings-intro { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .paintings-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .passions-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .instruments-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .travel-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    nav .nav-links { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="inicio">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Barranquilla, Colombia — 15 años</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">I<span>saac</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Artista · Bailarín · Músico · Viajero</p>
    <div class="hero-icons">
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Pintura">🎨</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Ballet">🩰</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Música">🎹</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Viajes">✈️</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Baile">💃</span>
      <span class="hero-icon" title="Patinaje">⛸️</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>Explorar</span>
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <span class="nav-logo">Isaac</span>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#sobre-mi">Sobre mí</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pasiones">Pasiones</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pinturas">Arte</a></li>
    <li><a href="#viajes">Viajes</a></li>
    <li><a href="#musica">Música</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- SOBRE MÍ -->
<section id="sobre-mi">
  <div class="about-layout reveal">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p class="section-label">Sobre mí</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Una vida llena<br>de arte y movimiento</h2>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <p>
        Soy Isaac, tengo <strong>15 años</strong> y crecí en Barranquilla, la ciudad del carnaval. Desde pequeño el arte y la expresión han sido parte de mi vida: estudié <strong>ballet clásico</strong> desde los 5 años, y aunque lo dejé para enfocarme en mis estudios, esa disciplina dejó huella en todo lo que hago.
      </p>
      <p>
        Me apasiona la <strong>pintura y el dibujo técnico</strong> — los cuadros que ves aquí los pinté yo mismo. Hay algo en convertir una tela en blanco en un mundo de color que me fascina profundamente.
      </p>
      <p>
        También me encanta bailar: la <strong>salsa, el merengue, el mapalé y la champeta</strong> son parte de mi identidad caribeña. Y recientemente, viendo los Juegos Olímpicos de Milán-Cortina, me enamoré del <strong>patinaje sobre hielo</strong> — un sueño nuevo por conquistar.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="about-card">
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Ciudad</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Barranquilla 🇨🇴</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Edad</span>
        <span class="stat-value">15 años</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Ballet</span>
        <span class="stat-value">5 años de formación</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Pinturas</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Óleo & Acrílico</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Países visitados</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Francia · Italia</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Instrumentos</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Piano · Bajo eléctrico</span>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <span class="stat-label">Próximo sueño</span>
        <span class="stat-value">Patinaje sobre hielo ⛸️</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PASIONES -->
<div class="passions-bg" id="pasiones">
  <div class="passions-inner">
    <p class="section-label">Lo que me define</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--cream)">Mis Pasiones</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="passions-grid reveal">
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">🎨</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Arte & Pintura</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Óleo y acrílico sobre lienzo. Paisajes marinos, figuras y naturaleza. El arte es mi forma de procesar el mundo.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Técnico & Libre</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">🩰</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Danza</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Ballet clásico por 5 años, hoy salsa, merengue, mapalé y champeta. El ritmo de Barranquilla corre por mis venas.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Desde los 5 años</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">✈️</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Viajes</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">París, Milán, Venecia, Florencia y Pisa ya están en mi mapa. Londres es el próximo destino en mi lista.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Europa conquistada</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">🎹</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Música</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Piano y bajo eléctrico como instrumentos actuales. El violín y la flauta traversa son mis próximas metas musicales.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Clásico & Moderno</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">⛸️</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Patinaje sobre Hielo</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">Un sueño encendido por los Juegos Olímpicos de Milán-Cortina 2026. La elegancia del hielo me cautivó.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Sueño por cumplir</span>
      </div>
      <div class="passion-card">
        <span class="passion-icon">📐</span>
        <h3 class="passion-name">Dibujo Técnico</h3>
        <p class="passion-desc">La precisión del dibujo técnico complementa la libertad de la pintura. Amo la fusión entre arte y exactitud.</p>
        <span class="passion-tag">Arte & Precisión</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PINTURAS -->
<div class="paintings-section" id="pinturas">
  <div style="max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">
    <div class="paintings-intro reveal">
      <div>
        <p class="section-label">Galería personal</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">Mis Pinturas</h2>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <p>Cada cuadro es un mundo que construí pincelada a pincelada. Trabajo principalmente con acrílico, explorando desde la serenidad de los paisajes marinos hasta la energía del movimiento y la vida marina.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:right;">
        <span style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:4rem; color:rgba(42,36,22,0.12); line-height:1;">🖌️</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="paintings-grid reveal">
      <div class="painting-item">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
